subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm and steadfast in the Divine Covenant and Testament! What thou didst write was noted. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت راسخ بر عهد و میثاق الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید طوبی لک
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
